response_text:
ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR airport_location : varchar
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY City
PK city_name
ATTR city_name : varchar : PK

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration_number
ATTR registration_number : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR departure_airport_code : varchar : FK
ATTR arrival_airport_code : varchar : FK
ATTR airline_code : varchar : FK
ATTR airplane_registration_number : varchar : FK

ENTITY Passenger
PK passport_number
ATTR passport_number : varchar : PK
ATTR customer_name : varchar
ATTR customer_surname : varchar

ENTITY Seat
PK flight_number, flight_date, seat_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR flight_date : date : PK : FK
ATTR seat_number : varchar : PK

ENTITY CrewMember
PK license_number
ATTR license_number : varchar : PK
ATTR crew_name : varchar
ATTR crew_role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK flight_number, flight_date, status_date, status_hour
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR flight_date : date : PK : FK
ATTR status_code : varchar
ATTR status : varchar
ATTR status_date : date : PK
ATTR status_hour : time : PK

ENTITY BaggageBelt
PK belt_number
ATTR belt_number : varchar : PK

ENTITY CrewAssignment
PK flight_number, flight_date, license_number
ATTR flight_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR flight_date : date : PK : FK
ATTR license_number : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR crew_role : varchar

REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1..N : FK=departure_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1..N : FK=arrival_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=airplane_registration_number
REL Seat -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_number, flight_date
REL Seat -> Passenger : 1 -> 1 : FK=passport_number
REL FlightStatus -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_number, flight_date
REL BaggageBelt -> Flight : 0..1 -> 1 : FK=belt_number
REL CrewAssignment -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_number, flight_date
REL CrewAssignment -> CrewMember : 1..N -> 1 : FK=license_number
REL City -> Airport : 1 -> 1..N :
